rule_metadata.author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
rule_metadata.title: Potential Russian APT Credential Theft Activity

rules.rule_text:
title: Potential Russian APT Credential Theft Activity
id: b83f5166-9237-4b5e-9cd4-7b5d52f4d8ee
status: stable
description: Detects Russian group activity as described in Global Threat Report 2019
  by Crowdstrike
references:
- https://www.documentcloud.org/documents/5743766-Global-Threat-Report-2019.html
author: Florian Roth (Nextron Systems)
date: 2019-02-21
modified: 2023-03-08
tags:
- attack.credential-access
- attack.t1552.001
- attack.t1003.003
- detection.emerging-threats
logsource:
  category: process_creation
  product: windows
detection:
  selection_xcopy:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - xcopy /S /E /C /Q /H \\\\
    - \sysvol\
  selection_adexplorer:
    CommandLine|contains|all:
    - adexplorer -snapshot "" c:\users\
    - \downloads\
    - .snp
  condition: 1 of selection_*
falsepositives:
- Unlikely
level: critical
